description: Complete demonstration of the Carrier MVP Use Case 1: Customer Service Case Triage Agent Swarm
use_case: MVP Use Case 1 - Customer Service Case Triage
problem_statement: Customer service cases in Salesforce often sit untriaged for days, increasing SLA risk and driving unnecessary call volume
solution: AI-powered agent swarm that automatically triages new cases, extracts key information, and routes to appropriate teams

demo_flow.title: Case Arrives
demo_flow.description: New case created in Salesforce with subject 'RTU not cooling - E47 error'

demo_flow.title: Attachment Analysis
demo_flow.description: Customer attached photo of error display showing E47 code
demo_flow.action: GPT-4 Vision extracts E47 error code from image

demo_flow.title: AI Text Analysis
demo_flow.description: Case text analyzed for issue type, urgency, and product references
demo_flow.action: Identifies: Equipment Failure, Critical urgency, 50XC product

demo_flow.title: Product Context
demo_flow.description: Equipment details enriched from product database
demo_flow.action: Retrieves warranty status (expired), service history, known bulletins

demo_flow.title: Triage Summary
demo_flow.description: Generate actionable summary with routing recommendation
demo_flow.action: Priority: High, Queue: Field Service, Action: Dispatch technician

demo_flow.title: Update Salesforce
demo_flow.description: Write triage results back to case record
demo_flow.action: Updates custom fields with triage data and routing

demo_case.subject: RTU not cooling - E47 error
demo_case.description: Our rooftop unit 50XC (serial 2419G12345) stopped cooling this morning. Display shows E47 error. Temperature in building is 82F and climbing. We have a corporate event tonight - URGENT!
attachments: error_display.jpg - photo of E47 error on control panel

expected_triage_result.summary: RTU not cooling with E47 low superheat error. Enterprise customer with event tonight requires immediate response.
expected_triage_result.recommended_action: Dispatch technician for refrigerant system diagnosis
expected_triage_result.relevant_bulletin: SB-2024-047: E47 Error - TXV Sensing Bulb
